---
title: "My Projects"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, categories, description]
---

Welcome to my project portfolio. Below you will find examples of my work from College> These projects span topics such as machine learning, business recommendations, product development, economics and thesis writing.
